changes: 4 new free-tier AI providers added: Groq, Cerebras, Mistral, and Cohere
Save multiple custom model IDs per provider, not just one
Setup page now checks model availability in real time and flags retired models
Setup page now shows a "What's new" changelog when an update is available
Smoother, more consistent layout on phones and tablets
Results page now shows the experience level a posting asks for
Job benefits and perks (insurance, bonuses, leave, etc.) are now extracted and shown
More reliable analysis from fast/lite AI models
More consistent match scores between re-analyzing the same resume and posting
More accurate job details when analyzing LinkedIn postings
Sharper, more specific ATS notes and analysis suggestions
Added OpenRouter as a free AI provider option
